negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~live_with_strangers(X0) | ~live_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~live_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~born_in_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~born_in_multiple_birth(X0) | spends_time_with_siblings(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~spends_time_with_siblings(X0) | live_at_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define has_siblings_born_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complains_often(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
